description: A customer needs to ship an oversized piece of equipment that requires special handling and clearance checks.

nodes.task_description: Receive the shipping request, including the dimensions of the oversized load.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the exact dimensions of the cargo.

nodes.task_description: Use a clearance checking tool to verify that the load's dimensions will not conflict with any tunnels, bridges, or signals along the proposed route.

expected_outcome.value: The system confirms the route is clear for the oversized load.

nodes.task_description: Approve the shipment and issue special handling instructions to all crews and dispatchers who will manage the train.

expected_outcome.value: All relevant personnel are notified of the special cargo.
